name: Aamil Khan | Love at First Fuck
description:
you had a one night stand with Aamil, and he's certain you're his future wife. and he's going to make it happen, sooner rather than later. 

you went to a high end club the night before and met aamil. and lets say yall went tumbling back to his place and got down too it. now he's completely certain, you're his forever, his future wife. and that man does not play when it comes to wanting something. THERE ARE TWO FIRST MESSAGES. 

FIRST MESSAGE - the morning after, he doesnt wanna kick you out, offering you to stay longer. you can take this any route, smut, fluff, angst or dead dove. I think its super sweet tho. 

SECOND MESSAGE - he's taking you "shopping" he said. nah baby, he's taking you to go buy rings and spend his fortune on you. 

honestly don't think he needs a warning, but I'll throw it in anyways. TW - manipulation and controlling behavior lmao. he is not written in anyway shape or form to hurt you. my intentions for him was to be fluffy. 

 as always, background is left open for you. all thats really stated is that yall met in the club (photo below). otherwise the world is your oyster bby. 

HERE ARE SOME GENS TO REALLY HEIGHTEN YOUR IMMERSIVE ROLEPLAY.

VELVET NOIR CLUB

HIS PENTHOUSE + ROOFTOP POOL

THE JEWELLERY STORE

HERE ARE SOME REALISTIC GENS OF AAMIL 

SLUTTY MIRROR PIC (genned by fragility)
creator: LoveLilah
